operations.title: As Dead by Daylight turns 10, Behavior unveils game-changing overhaul that will "make the next ten better than the first"

operations.contents: It's hard to believe that we've had ten years of Dead by Daylight. From its humble origins with just The Trapper, The Wraith, and The Hillbilly, it now sports a roster of 43 terrors, some of which hai

operations.title: Dead by Daylight | 10th Anniversary Broadcast
operations.author: mahdi.roy
operations.contents: Celebrate 10 years of Dead by Daylight with our biggest Anniversary broadcast ever. We’re pulling out all the stops with massive reveals, exciting Chapter announcements, incredible special guests, and

store.name: 黎明杀机
store.short_description: 10年恐惧相伴。10年的惊吓与刺激体验。10年的残暴献祭与惊险逃脱。 永久困于邪恶的幻境之中，即使死亡也无法逃脱，这是一场需要勇气和智慧的较量，四名意志坚定的逃生者在残忍对局中面对嗜血杀手。选择一方，进入多人非对称竞技游戏世界，获得最佳恐怖游戏体验。
store.short_description_en: 10 years of horror. 10 years of jump scares and close calls. 10 years of brutal sacrifices and thrilling escapes. Trapped forever in a realm of eldritch evil where even death is not an escape, four determined Survivors face a bloodthirsty Killer in a vicious game of nerve and wits.
